sentence: 社工帮助了许多有困难的家庭。
pinyin: Shè gōng bāngzhù le xǔduō yǒu kùnnán de jiātíng.
english: Social workers have helped many families in need.

sentence: 他在网上买东西受骗了，损失了不少钱。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎngshàng mǎi dōngxi shòupiàn le, sǔnshī le bù shǎo qián.
english: He got cheated while shopping online and lost quite a bit of money.

sentence: 冰箱里的剩菜通通处理掉了。
pinyin: Bīng xiāng lǐ de shèng cài tōng tōng chǔ lǐ diào le.
english: All the leftovers in the fridge were cleared out.

sentence: 朋友们聚在一起庆贺他的晋升。
pinyin: Péngyoumen jù zài yīqǐ qìnghè tā de jìnshēng.
english: Friends gathered to celebrate his promotion.

sentence: 自己做饭比外卖省钱多了。
pinyin: Zìjǐ zuòfàn bǐ wàimài shěngqián duō le.
english: Cooking at home saves a lot more money than ordering takeout.

sentence: 这个故事情节太荒诞了。
pinyin: Zhège gùshi qíngjié tài huāngdàn le.
english: The plot of this story is absolutely preposterous.

meaning: 1. to execute by firing squad; 2. to shoot dead; 3. fig. to discard; 4
sentence: 这个方案在会议上被经理直接枪毙了。
pinyin: Zhè ge fāng àn zài huì yì shàng bèi jīng lǐ zhí jiē qiāng bì le.
english: This proposal was shot down outright by the manager during the meeting.

meaning: 1. the current period; 2. this term (usually in finance)
sentence: 本期杂志的封面人物是一位年轻歌手。
pinyin: Běn qī zá zhì de fēng miàn rén wù shì yī wèi nián qīng gē shǒu.
english: The cover person of this issue of the magazine is a young singer.

meaning: 1. film enthusiast; 2. movie fan; 3. CL:個|个[gè]
sentence: 她是个资深影迷，每周都去看电影。
pinyin: Tā shì gè zīshēn yǐngmí, měi zhōu dōu qù kàn diànyǐng.
english: She's a dedicated movie fan who goes to the cinema every week.

meaning: 1. to withdraw money from a bank
sentence: 我去银行取款，发现账户里没钱了。
pinyin: Wǒ qù yínháng qǔkuǎn, fāxiàn zhànghù lǐ méi qián le.
english: I went to the bank to withdraw money and found the account was empty.

sentence: 你记得去交费，别让电话停了。
pinyin: Nǐ jì de qù jiāo fèi, bié ràng diàn huà tíng le.
english: Remember to pay the bill so your phone doesn't get cut off.

sentence: 护士们每天都在医疗第一线工作。
pinyin: Hùshimen měitiān dōu zài yīliáo dìyīxiàn gōngzuò.
english: Nurses work on the front line of healthcare every day.

sentence: 她和表亲每年春节聚一次。
pinyin: Tā hé biǎoqīn měi nián Chūnjié jù yī cì.
english: She gets together with her cousins once a year during Spring Festival.

sentence: 她毕业后在高校做了两年博士后研究。
pinyin: Tā bìyè hòu zài gāoxiào zuò le liǎng nián bóshìhòu yánjiū.
english: After graduating she did two years of postdoctoral research at a university.

sentence: 他喜欢写随笔记录日常生活。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān xiě suíbǐ jìlù rìcháng shēnghuó.
english: He likes to write casual essays to record his daily life.

sentence: 工程师对系统进行了最优化处理。
pinyin: Gōngchéngshī duì xìtǒng jìnxíng le zuì yōuhuà chǔlǐ.
english: The engineer performed optimization on the system.

sentence: 这家公司只招聘应届毕业生。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zhǐ zhāopìn yìngjiè bìyèshēng.
english: This company only recruits this year's graduates.

meaning: 1. dried food (including dried fruits, mushrooms and seafoods such as
sentence: 超市里的干货区卖各种干蘑菇。
pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ de gānhuò qū mài gèzhǒng gān mógu.
english: The dried goods section of the supermarket sells various kinds of dried mushrooms.

sentence: 他跳槽是为了得到一份高薪工作。
pinyin: Tā tiàocáo shì wèile dédào yī fèn gāoxīn gōngzuò.
english: He changed jobs in order to get a high-paying position.

sentence: 请核对一下产品上的批号。
pinyin: Qǐng héduì yīxià chǎnpǐn shàng de pīhào.
english: Please check the batch number on the product.

sentence: 他练习重剑已经有五年了。
pinyin: Tā liànxí zhòngjiàn yǐjīng yǒu wǔ nián le.
english: He has been practicing épée for five years.

meaning: 1. to drop out of school; 2. to leave off studying; 3. to interrupt on
sentence: 他因家庭困难而辍学打工。
pinyin: Tā yīn jiātíng kùnnán ér chuòxué dǎgōng.
english: He dropped out of school due to family financial difficulties and started working.

sentence: "你"是一个人称代词。
pinyin: "Nǐ" shì yī gè rénchēng dàicí.
english: "You" is a personal pronoun.

sentence: 他们俩有很多共同点，相处融洽。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎ yǒu hěn duō gòngtóngdiǎn, xiāngchǔ róngqià.
english: The two of them have a lot in common and get along very well.

sentence: 他把笔记本电脑放在桌上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ bǐjìběn diànnǎo fàng zài zhuō shàng.
english: He put his laptop on the desk.

sentence: 老师讲解了这种句式的用法。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jiǎngjiě le zhè zhǒng jùshì de yòngfǎ.
english: The teacher explained the usage of this sentence pattern.

sentence: 他每天走小巷捷径去上班。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǒu xiǎoxiàng jiéjìng qù shàngbān.
english: He takes the alley shortcut to work every day.

sentence: 这张照片的构图非常均衡。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng zhàopiàn de gòutú fēicháng jūnhéng.
english: The composition of this photo is very balanced.

sentence: 每到周末村里都有集市。
pinyin: Měi dào zhōumò cūnlǐ dōu yǒu jíshì.
english: Every weekend there is a market in the village.

sentence: 那艘小船慢慢地开始下沉。
pinyin: Nà sōu xiǎochuán mànmàn de kāishǐ xià chén.
english: That small boat slowly began to sink.

sentence: 那座军事基地附近禁止拍照。
pinyin: Nà zuò jūnshì jīdì fùjìn jìnzhǐ pāizhào.
english: Photography is prohibited near that military base.

meaning: 1. angular velocity; 2. number of revolutions per minute
sentence: 发动机的转速太高会损坏零件。
pinyin: Fādòngjī de zhuǎnsù tài gāo huì sǔnhuài língjian.
english: If the engine's RPM is too high, it can damage the parts.

sentence: 这些蔬菜可以贮存两周左右。
pinyin: Zhèxiē shūcài kěyǐ zhùcún liǎng zhōu zuǒyòu.
english: These vegetables can be stored for about two weeks.

sentence: 她每天早上要穿校服去上学。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang yào chuān xiàofú qù shàngxué.
english: She has to wear her school uniform to school every morning.

sentence: 那位生物学家在研究海洋珊瑚。
pinyin: Nà wèi shēngwùxuéjiā zài yánjiū hǎiyáng shānhú.
english: That biologist is studying ocean coral.

sentence: 他紧张地盯着扳机，不敢动弹。
pinyin: Tā jǐnzhāng de dīngzhe bānjī, bù gǎn dòngtan.
english: He stared nervously at the trigger, not daring to move.

sentence: 山脚下有一家古老的客栈。
pinyin: Shānjiǎo xià yǒu yì jiā gǔlǎo de kèzhàn.
english: There is an old inn at the foot of the mountain.

sentence: 我预约了下周一的眼科门诊。
pinyin: Wǒ yùyuē le xià zhōuyī de yǎnkē ménzhěn.
english: I made an appointment for the ophthalmology clinic next Monday.

sentence: 这张桌子是椭圆形的，很适合聚餐。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng zhuōzi shì tuǒyuánxíng de, hěn shìhé jùcān.
english: This table is oval-shaped, which is great for group meals.

sentence: 办公室新买了一台咖啡机。
pinyin: Bàngōngshì xīn mǎi le yì tái kāfēijī.
english: The office just bought a new coffee machine.

sentence: 他平时冷面，但对孩子很温柔。
pinyin: Tā píngshí lěngmiàn, dàn duì háizi hěn wēnróu.
english: He usually looks stern, but he is very gentle with children.

sentence: 她推着婴儿车在公园里散步。
pinyin: Tā tuīzhe yīng'érchē zài gōngyuán lǐ sànbù.
english: She was strolling through the park pushing a baby stroller.

sentence: 工人们正在修复损坏的铁轨。
pinyin: Gōngrénmen zhèngzài xiūfù sǔnhuài de tiěguǐ.
english: Workers are repairing the damaged railroad tracks.

sentence: 这家超市提供全天候服务，很方便。
pinyin: Zhè jiā chāoshì tígōng quántiānhòu fúwù, hěn fāngbiàn.
english: This supermarket offers all-weather, round-the-clock service, which is very convenient.

sentence: 几名便衣警察混在人群中巡逻。
pinyin: Jǐ míng biànyī jǐngchá hùn zài rénqún zhōng xúnluó.
english: Several plainclothes officers were patrolling among the crowd.

sentence: 他对我的帮助真是恩情无量。
pinyin: Tā duì wǒ de bāngzhù zhēn shì ēnqíng wúliàng.
english: His help to me is truly immeasurable.

meaning: 1. unconventional; 2. licentious; 3. wanton; 4. easy in one's mor
sentence: 父母担心他在外面生活放荡。
pinyin: Fùmǔ dānxīn tā zài wàimiàn shēnghuó fàngdàng.
english: His parents worry that he is living a dissolute life away from home.

sentence: 演员戴上头套后完全认不出来了。
pinyin: Yǎnyuán dài shàng tóutào hòu wánquán rèn bu chūlái le.
english: After the actor put on the headgear, he was completely unrecognizable.

meaning: 1. exhaust gas; 2. industrial waste gas; 3. steam
sentence: 工厂排放的废气污染了空气。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng páifàng de fèiqì wūrǎn le kōngqì.
english: The exhaust gas discharged by the factory polluted the air.

sentence: 妈妈在市场上买了几米布料。
pinyin: Māma zài shìchǎng shàng mǎi le jǐ mǐ bùliào.
english: Mom bought a few meters of fabric at the market.
